manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v52
- Disabled the ads on the backup (huge shoutout to Raaz for sharing the flag, thank you! ❤️)
- Removed the 1 second minimum duration of stories.
- You can now lock the 2x speed in reels.
- Debloated the audio selection screen a bit.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
